nasb.text: May our God come and not keep silence; Fire devours before Him, And it is very tempestuous around Him.

esv.text: Our God comes; he does not keep silence; before him is a devouring fire, around him a mighty tempest.

cnv.text: 我們的　神來臨，決不緘默無聲； 在他面前有火燃燒， 在他四周有暴風颳起。

ccb.text: 我们的上帝来临， 并非悄然无声， 祂前面有烈火燃烧， 周围有暴风怒吼。

csbs.text: 我们的神来临，绝不沉默； 烈火在他面前吞噬，暴风在他四围刮起。
